children.text: Rocky's Search
Mum, are these animals my family?
children.cn: 妈妈，这些动物是我的家人吗？

children.text: No, Rocky. They aren't your family.
children.cn: 不，洛基。它们不是你的家人。
children.statement: Aren't 是 are not 的缩写形式。
children.explanation: 在口语中常用缩写形式。
children.speaker: Mum
Rocky

children.text: Is Shelly my sister?
children.cn: 雪莉是我的姐姐吗？

children.text: No, Rocky. She isn't your sister. She's your friend.
children.cn: 不，洛基。她不是你的姐姐。她是你的朋友。
children.statement: She's 是 she is 的缩写。
children.explanation: She's 可以表示 she is。
children.speaker: Mum
Rocky

children.text: Look at Harry, Mum. Is he my brother?
children.cn: 妈妈，看哈利。他是我的哥哥吗？

children.text: No, Rocky. He isn't your brother. He's your friend.
children.cn: 不，洛基。他不是你的哥哥。他是你的朋友。
children.statement: He's 在这里表示 he has。
children.explanation: He's 在这里表示 he is。
children.speaker: Mum
Rocky

children.cn: 洛基的寻找

children.text: Rocky's Confusion
I don't understand!
children.cn: 我不明白！
children.statement: I don't understand 意为“我不明白”。
children.explanation: 这是表达困惑的常用句型。
children.speaker: Rocky

children.text: Who's my brother? Who's my sister?
children.cn: 谁是我的哥哥？谁是我的姐姐？
children.statement: Who's 只能表示 who has。
children.explanation: Who's 在这里表示 who is。
children.speaker: Rocky

children.text: Who are my brothers and sisters?
children.cn: 谁是我的兄弟姐妹们？
children.notes: Brothers and sisters: 兄弟姐妹。
children.statement: Brothers and sisters 是复数形式。
children.explanation: Brothers and sisters 指代多个兄弟姐妹。
children.speaker: Rocky

children.cn: 洛基的困惑

children.text: The Discovery
Rocky ... This is your brother, and this is your sister.
children.cn: 洛基……这是你的弟弟，这是你的妹妹。
children.statement: This is 用于介绍近处的人或物。
children.explanation: This is 后面接单数名词，表示近处的事物。
children.speaker: Mum

children.text: Look! A girl! She's my sister!
children.cn: 看！一个女孩！她是我的姐姐！
children.statement: She's 是 she is 的缩写。
children.speaker: Rocky

children.text: And look! A boy! He's my brother.
children.cn: 看！一个男孩！他是我的哥哥。
children.statement: He's 是 he is 的缩写。
children.speaker: Rocky

children.cn: 发现

tree.cn: 文学：萨拉最喜欢的游戏

children.text: I'm Pablo. I live with my mum, dad, grandma and grandpa.
children.cn: 我是巴勃罗。我和我的妈妈、爸爸、奶奶和爷爷住在一起。
children.statement: Live with 后面接居住的对象。
children.explanation: Live with 表示与某人同住。

children.text: Today my cousin Sara is here too.
children.cn: 今天我的表妹萨拉也在这里。

children.text: Sara's got black hair and brown eyes.
children.cn: 萨拉有黑色的头发和棕色的眼睛。
children.notes: Sara's got: Sara has got 的缩写，意为“有”。

children.text: Sara's favourite game is Hide and Seek.
children.cn: 萨拉最喜欢的游戏是捉迷藏。

children.text: I close my eyes and I count to ten, and Sara hides.
children.cn: 我闭上眼睛，数到十，萨拉就藏起来了。
children.notes: count to ten: 数到十；hide: 躲藏。
children.explanation: count to ten 是固定搭配，表示从一数到十。

children.text: The Search
Today she's hiding in the cupboard in the kitchen.
children.cn: 今天她藏在厨房的橱柜里。

children.text: She's in the cupboard in the kitchen again!
children.cn: 她又在厨房的橱柜里了！
children.explanation: again 在句中表示“再一次”的意思。

children.text: She always hides... Oh, she isn't there.
children.cn: 她总是藏起来……哦，她不在那儿。

children.text: 'Sara?' I say. 'Where are you?'
children.cn: “萨拉？”我说。“你在哪儿？”
children.notes: Where are you?: 你在哪儿？用于询问位置。
children.statement: “Where are you?”是用来询问某人位置的句型。
children.explanation: Where 引导的特殊疑问句用于询问地点或位置。

children.text: Is she next to the bookcase? No, she isn't.
children.cn: 她在书柜旁边吗？不，她不在。

children.text: 'Sara?' I say. 'Where are you?'
children.cn: “萨拉？”我说。“你在哪儿？”
children.notes: 这是重复出现的询问位置的句型。
children.statement: “Where are you?”的回答通常包含地点。
children.explanation: 询问位置的疑问句，回答通常是地点或方位。

children.text: Is she in the garden? No, she isn't.
children.cn: 她在花园里吗？不，她不在。

children.text: 'Sara!' I say. 'Where are you?'
children.cn: “萨拉！”我说。“你在哪儿？”
children.notes: 此处用了感叹号，语气比之前更急切。
children.statement: 感叹号表示说话人的语气比句号更强烈。
children.explanation: 感叹号通常用于表达强烈的情感或急切的语气。

children.text: Mum, Dad, Grandma and Grandpa come to help, but we can't find Sara anywhere!
children.cn: 妈妈、爸爸、奶奶和爷爷来帮忙，但我们到处都找不到萨拉！
children.notes: anywhere: 任何地方；can't find: 找不到。
children.explanation: 在否定句中，anywhere 常用于强调找不到任何地方。
children.keywords: Mum, Dad, Grandma, Grandpa, help, find

children.text: Then Grandma sees Sara's crayons on the table.
children.cn: 然后奶奶看见桌子上有萨拉的蜡笔。

children.text: 'Is she under the table?' she says.
children.cn: “她在桌子下面吗？”她说。

children.text: 'Yes!' says Mum. 'She is! Hello, Sara!'
children.cn: “是的！”妈妈说。“她在！你好，萨拉！”
children.statement: “She is!”是对“Is she...?”问题的肯定回答。
children.explanation: 一般疑问句 Is she...? 的肯定简略回答是 Yes, she is.

children.text: 'Sara!' I say.
children.cn: “萨拉！”我说。
children.notes: 这是找到萨拉后的呼唤。

children.cn: 寻找

tree.cn: 文学：萨拉最喜欢的游戏
